Z1-FM-01: use matching routines for one versus many
repeat broad quantity language in concrete settings
Z1-FM-02: ask what changed after each action
slow the sequence so the learner attends to the change event
Z1-FM-03: sort examples into same and different quantity states
pair simple more versus less examples side by side
name the state explicitly in teacher language
Z1-FM-04: move from objects to pictures to everyday situations
ask the same quantity question in multiple contexts
use parallel examples with different materials
